allow: Bash(node -e "try { JSON.parse\(require\(''fs''\).readFileSync\(''$f'',''utf8''\)\); console.log\(''✓ Valid JSON''\); } catch\(e\) { console.log\(''✗ ERROR: '' + e.message\); }")
Bash(node -e "const crypto = require\(''crypto''\); const hash = crypto.createHash\(''sha256''\).update\(''cleanfix2026''\).digest\(''hex''\); console.log\(hash\);")
